title: Creamy Mushroom & Herb Cheese Tortellini
description: HelloFresh Hall of Fame — cheese-stuffed tortellini smothered in a rich, umami-packed creamy mushroom sauce with fresh herbs, topped with chili flakes and scallion greens. A mysteriously satisfying bowl that earns its legendary status.
instructions: Cook tortellini according to package directions. Drain, reserving ½ cup pasta water.
Slice mushrooms. Mince garlic and shallot. Slice scallions, keeping whites and greens separate. Strip thyme leaves.
Heat butter and olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add mushrooms in a single layer; cook undisturbed for 3 minutes until golden. Stir and cook 2 more minutes.
Add shallot, scallion whites, garlic, and thyme. Cook 2 minutes until softened. Season with salt and pepper.
Pour in broth and scrape up any browned bits. Add heavy cream and bring to a simmer. Cook 3–4 minutes until slightly thickened.
Add drained tortellini to the sauce. Toss gently to coat, adding pasta water as needed to loosen the sauce.
Remove from heat. Stir in parmesan until melted and the sauce is silky.
Serve topped with scallion greens, red pepper flakes, and extra parmesan.
tips: Don't stir the mushrooms right away — letting them sit undisturbed for a few minutes gets them golden and caramelized rather than steamed.
Dried tortellini works too; just adjust cooking time per the package.
For a deeper umami flavor, add a teaspoon of soy sauce or a small splash of white wine with the broth.
Spinach or kale stirred in at the end adds color and nutrition.
